history.en: Distinguished by truly unique ears that curl back in a graceful arc, offering an alert, perky, happily surprised expression, they cause people to break out into a big smile when viewing their first Curl. Curls are very people-oriented, faithful, affectionate soulmates, adjusting remarkably fast to other pets, children, and new situations.
history.zh: 以真正独特的耳朵为特征，耳朵向后卷曲成优雅的弧线，展现出警觉、活泼、惊喜的表情，让人第一次看到卷耳猫时不禁露出灿烂的笑容。卷耳猫非常以人为中心，忠诚、深情，能迅速适应其他宠物、儿童和新环境。

overview.en: The American Curl is a distinctive cat breed known for its uniquely curled ears, which give it an alert and perky expression. These cats are affectionate, curious, and highly intelligent, making them wonderful companions. They are interactive and playful, often seeking out human interaction and engaging in games. American Curls are social and adapt well to various environments, including homes with children and other pets. Their friendly and faithful nature makes them loyal soulmates. Despite their unusual ears, they are healthy and robust, with a lifespan of 12-16 years. Their personality is a perfect blend of playfulness and affection, making them a joy to have around.
overview.zh: 美国卷耳猫是一种独特的猫品种，以其独特的卷曲耳朵而闻名，给人一种警觉而活泼的表情。它们深情、好奇且非常聪明，是绝佳的伴侣。它们互动性强且爱玩，经常寻求人类互动并参与游戏。美国卷耳猫善于社交，能很好地适应各种环境，包括有孩子和其他宠物的家庭。它们友好而忠诚的性格使其成为忠实的灵魂伴侣。尽管耳朵独特，但它们健康强壮，寿命为12-16年。它们的性格完美融合了活泼和深情，让它们成为生活中的乐趣。

care.en: American Curls require moderate grooming. Their coat is silky and lies flat, so weekly brushing is sufficient to remove loose hair and prevent matting. During shedding seasons, more frequent brushing may be needed. Bathe only when necessary. Their ears require special attention: gently clean the outer ear with a soft cloth or cotton ball, but never insert anything into the ear canal. Check ears weekly for dirt or wax buildup. Provide scratching posts to maintain claw health. Exercise needs are moderate; interactive play sessions of 10-15 minutes twice daily keep them stimulated. Annual vet check-ups, vaccinations, and dental care are essential. Spay/neuter is recommended unless breeding.
care.zh: 美国卷耳猫需要适度的梳理。它们的被毛丝滑且平顺，每周刷毛一次足以去除死毛并防止打结。换毛季节可能需要更频繁地梳理。仅在必要时洗澡。耳朵需要特别注意：用软布或棉球轻轻清洁外耳，但切勿将任何物品插入耳道。每周检查耳朵是否有污垢或耳垢堆积。提供猫抓板以维护爪子健康。运动需求适中；每天两次10-15分钟的互动游戏能保持其活力。每年体检、接种疫苗和牙齿护理至关重要。除非用于繁殖，否则建议绝育。

training.en: American Curls are intelligent and eager to please, making training relatively easy. Use positive reinforcement techniques such as treats, praise, and clicker training. They can learn tricks, fetch, and even walk on a leash with patience. Start training early, as kittens are more receptive. Keep sessions short (5-10 minutes) and fun to maintain their interest. Consistency is key. They respond well to puzzle toys and interactive games that challenge their minds. Avoid punishment, as it can cause fear and distrust. Socialization is also important: expose them to different people, sounds, and experiences gradually. With proper training, they become well-mannered and adaptable companions.
training.zh: 美国卷耳猫聪明且乐于取悦，使得训练相对容易。使用正面强化方法，如零食、表扬和响片训练。它们可以学习把戏、捡球，甚至在有耐心的情况下用牵引绳散步。尽早开始训练，因为幼猫更容易接受。保持训练简短（5-10分钟）且有趣，以维持它们的兴趣。一致性是关键。它们对益智玩具和挑战思维的互动游戏反应良好。避免惩罚，因为这会引起恐惧和不信任。社交化也很重要：逐渐让它们接触不同的人、声音和经历。通过适当的训练，它们会成为举止得体且适应能力强的伴侣。

diet.en: Feed a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for their life stage (kitten, adult, senior). American Curls are not prone to obesity, but portion control is still important. Provide a mix of wet and dry food to ensure hydration and dental health. Look for foods with real meat as the first ingredient, and avoid fillers like corn and soy. Treats should be given in moderation. Fresh, clean water must always be available. Some Curls may have food sensitivities, so monitor for signs of allergies. Consult your vet for specific dietary recommendations, especially if your cat has health issues. A consistent feeding schedule (e.g., two meals per day) helps maintain routine.
diet.zh: 根据生命阶段（幼猫、成猫、老年猫）提供高质量、均衡的饮食。美国卷耳猫不易肥胖，但控制份量仍然重要。提供湿粮和干粮混合，以确保水分摄入和牙齿健康。选择以真实肉类为首要成分的食物，避免玉米和大豆等填充物。零食应适量给予。始终提供新鲜干净的水。一些卷耳猫可能有食物敏感性，因此注意过敏迹象。咨询兽医以获得具体的饮食建议，特别是如果您的猫有健康问题。一致的喂食时间表（例如每天两餐）有助于维持规律。

livingTips.en: American Curls adapt well to various living situations, including apartments and houses. They are not overly active but enjoy vertical spaces like cat trees and shelves. A secure outdoor enclosure or harness training can allow safe outdoor exploration. They are excellent with children and other pets, including dogs, due to their social and gentle nature. Provide plenty of interactive toys and scratching posts. They are curious and may open cabinets, so childproof locks are advisable. Ensure windows and balconies are screened to prevent falls. They thrive on companionship and should not be left alone for long periods. A second pet can be a good idea if you are away often.
livingTips.zh: 美国卷耳猫能很好地适应各种生活环境，包括公寓和房屋。它们不是特别活跃，但喜欢垂直空间，如猫树和架子。安全的户外围栏或牵引绳训练可以让它们安全地探索户外。由于它们社交且温和的天性，它们与孩子和其他宠物（包括狗）相处得很好。提供大量的互动玩具和抓板。它们好奇，可能会打开橱柜，因此建议使用儿童安全锁。确保窗户和阳台有纱窗以防止坠落。它们需要陪伴，不应长时间独处。如果您经常外出，养另一只宠物是个好主意。
